tree.label: Deliver a minimal tree-based terminal todo application

children.label: Define the installable uv-managed Python project
Add project metadata, console entry point, pytest configuration, and build backend
Lock the uv-managed environment
Document launch command, data location, and keyboard controls
Initialize the tree_todo package
Implement tree state and durable interchange formats
Implement task hierarchy, derived completion states, visible-node flattening, and mutations
Persist versioned snapshots under the XDG data directory and support JSON interchange
Convert between task trees and indented Markdown checklists
Provide interactive navigation and editing
Connect curses rendering, Vim-style commands, automatic saves, imports/exports, and undo/redo
Verify tree behavior and file conversions
Cover hierarchy changes and derived completion
Cover versioned JSON save and load behavior
Cover Markdown tree parsing and export
Run the unit test suite
uv run pytest
Compile the application modules

uv run python -m compileall -q tree_todo && rg --files | sort && sed -n '1,260p' /home/balalida/.codex/skills/atml-update-traces/references/atml-1.0.md && sed -n '1,260p' /home/balalida/.codex/skills/atml-update-traces/references/authoring-guide.md

evidence.value: uv run python -m compileall -q tree_todo && rg --files | sort && sed -n '1,260p' /home/balalida/.codex/skills/atml-update-traces/references/atml-1.0.md && sed -n '1,260p' /home/balalida/.codex/skills/atml-update-traces/references/authoring-guide.md

children.label: Run final behavior, compilation, and trace validation
uv run pytest && uv run python -m compileall -q tree_todo && uv run python -m json.tool traces.json >/dev/null

evidence.value: uv run pytest && uv run python -m compileall -q tree_todo && uv run python -m json.tool traces.json >/dev/null
evidence.result: 7 passed in 0.01s; compilation and JSON validation completed successfully

children.label: Record the completed implementation evidence map
Create the ATML evidence map for this implementation

tree.label: Prepare first-release installation and publication guidance

children.label: Document uv installation, project launch, use, development checks, and GitHub publication
Check whether the project has a Git repository before publishing
sed -n '1,220p' README.md && git rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree 2>&1 || true

evidence.result: README was read; Git reported that the directory is not a repository

tree.label: Publish a clean initial GitHub release

children.label: Exclude generated Python environments, test caches, and bytecode from version control
Initialize the repository, commit the application, and configure its GitHub SSH remote

git init && git add README.md pyproject.toml uv.lock tree_todo tests traces.json && git status --short && git commit -m "Initial tree-todo release" && git branch -M main && git remote add origin git@github.com:balalida22/tree-todo-py.git && git remote -v

evidence.value: git init && git add README.md pyproject.toml uv.lock tree_todo tests traces.json && git status --short && git commit -m "Initial tree-todo release" && git branch -M main && git remote add origin git@github.com:balalida22/tree-todo-py.git && git remote -v
evidence.result: Created the initial commit, renamed its branch to main, and configured origin

children.label: Amend the release without generated caches and push main to GitHub
git rm -r --cached tests/__pycache__ tree_todo/__pycache__ && git add .gitignore && git commit --amend --no-edit && git push -u origin main

evidence.value: git rm -r --cached tests/__pycache__ tree_todo/__pycache__ && git add .gitignore && git commit --amend --no-edit && git push -u origin main
evidence.result: Amended release 3c78a5e and pushed main to git@github.com:balalida22/tree-todo-py.git

children.label: Validate the trace and synchronize the amended release branch
python3 -m json.tool traces.json >/dev/null && git add traces.json && git commit --amend --no-edit && git push --force-with-lease origin main && git status --short

evidence.value: python3 -m json.tool traces.json >/dev/null && git add traces.json && git commit --amend --no-edit && git push --force-with-lease origin main && git status --short
evidence.result: Trace JSON validated; amended commit e10ffbf was force-with-lease pushed to origin/main with a clean status
